author: Samuel Vaillant
subject: fix(connectRange): handle boundaries on first call
body:
* fix(connectRange): handle boundaries on first call

* chore(RangeInput): add stories

* refactor(connectRange): inline min/max condition in getCurrentRefinement

* fix(connectRange): use lodash isFinite instead of isFinite

* refactor(connectRange): compute currentRange from getProvidedProps

* refactor(connectRange.test): avoid to pre-bind getMetadata function

* refactor(connectRange): return items from getMetadata only when values are different from range

* refactor(connectRange): use default parameter on getCurrentRange

* fix(connectRange): use undefined as default range
